# chalk_cluster_background_persistence_deployment_binding (Resource)

Manages a binding between a Chalk cluster and a background persistence deployment.

**Required permissions:** `project.create`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `background_persistence_deployment_id` (String) The ID of the background persistence deployment to bind to the cluster.
- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the cluster to bind to the background persistence deployment.
